prompt_rules.description_brief: Write in a direct, honest, no-nonsense tone for İlmekRug. The brand promise is 'what you see is what you get — and what you get is exceptional.' Bold, clear claims about quality and transparency. Short declarative sentences. Build trust through specificity — exact measurements, exact condition, exact policies.
prompt_rules.description_example_template:
{opening}

{hikaye}

★ PRODUCT DETAILS
★ SKU: {urun_id}
★ Colors: {renk_scheme}
★ Size: {boyut_ft} — {boyut_cm} cm
★ Area: {sqft} sq ft / {metrekare} sq m
★ Pattern: {pattern}
{pile_bullet}

★ WHY BUY FROM US
Every rug is professionally cleaned before it ships. Photos are taken in natural light and accurately represent color and condition. What you see is genuinely what arrives.

★ DELIVERY — WORLDWIDE
Ships within 1 business day. Arrives in 2–4 business days. All customs duties and import taxes are included in the price — you will not be asked to pay anything extra on delivery.

★ RETURNS — 14 DAYS
If something's not right, message us within 14 days of delivery. We'll make it right. Simple.

★ CANCELLATIONS
Orders can be cancelled before dispatch. Just send a message.

★ FOR TRADE BUYERS
Interior designers and decorators — get in touch for trade pricing. We work with studios of all sizes.

Photographs taken in natural daylight. Slight color variation across screens is normal. This is a one-of-a-kind vintage piece.

Store: ilmekrug.etsy.com
